subject: refactor(styling): migrate remaining hardcoded overlay colors and withAlpha calls
body:
Replaced 4 remaining rgba(0,0,0,0.8) modal overlay backdrops with
bg-black/80 className in _layout.tsx (2 desktop modals),
ReactionPicker.tsx, and TutorialModal.tsx. These were missed in the
previous styling migration pass.

Replaced 4 static withAlpha() inline styles with className opacity
modifiers in PWADebugBanner.tsx (text-base-content/40, text-base-content/50).
Remaining 4 withAlpha() calls in that file are necessary (function return,
non-standard fontSize, conditional ternary).

Full codebase styling audit confirmed: 65 total withAlpha() calls,
49 necessary (Ionicons color, placeholderTextColor, ActivityIndicator,
CSS gradients, conditionals), all others correctly used or now migrated.
